title: triticum aestivum var. miltura
intro: Triticum aestivum var. miltura, also known as spelt or hulled spelt, is a type of hexaploid wheat that is an ancient crop and a member of the Poaceae family. This plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of spelt include reducing the risk of chronic diseases such as heart disease, diabetes, and certain cancers, as well as improving digestion and boosting the immune system. Spelt can be prepared in various herbal forms, including tea, flour, and supplements, to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
